CVE-2021-40084.title: opensysusers through 0.6 does not safely use eval on files in sys ...
CVE-2021-40084.summary: opensysusers through 0.6 does not safely use eval on files in sysusers.d that may contain shell metacharacters. For example, it allows command execution via a crafted GECOS field whereas systemd-sysusers (a program with the same specification) does not do that.
